title: What happened during our AWS outage
title1: What happened during our AWS outage
title2: What happened during our AWS outage
description: AWS locked our account for four days over a Bedrock API key it thought was compromised. It wasn't. Here is what happened, what it meant for your data, and what we did about it.
shortDescription: AWS locked our account for four days over a Bedrock key it thought was compromised. It wasn't. No data was lost.
author: Cole Gottdank
